ead.archdesc:
======= RMM04178J. Douglas Carroll, Jr. papers4178Compiled by M. WarrenDivision of Rare and Manuscript Collections
July 20042B Carl A. Kroch LibraryCornell UniversityIthaca, NY 14853rareref@cornell.eduURL:
planThis finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-09-19 18:48:08 UTC.12/07/2018
This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)2007-05-29
converted from EAD 1.0 to EAD 2002 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
J. Douglas Carroll, Jr. papers
Carroll, J. Douglas, Jr.
4178
1.8 cubic feet. 1.8 cubic feet.
1938-1985. Correspondence, speeches, lectures, publications, and curriculum vitae. Correspondence, speeches, lectures, and publications about transportation issues in regional planning. Also curriculum vitae. Collection material in English 2079259
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
M. Warren
Date completed:
May 1985
EAD encoding:
Martin Heggestad, July 2004
BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
Planning consultant.
Member, International Fraternity of Lambda Alpha.
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Correspondence, speeches, lectures, and publications about transportation issues in regional planning. Also curriculum vitae.
RELATED MATERIALS
Part of Regional Science Archives.
Cite As:
J. Douglas Carroll, Jr. papers, #4178. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Regional science. Resumes. Real property -- Economic aspects. City planning. Urban transportation. Lambda Alpha International
